product_results.title: Cestfini High Heeld Wedge Sneakers for Women - Ladies Hidden Sneakers Lace Up Shoes, Best Chioce for Casual and Daily Wear

summary.text: Customers find these shoes very comfortable, describing them as feeling like pillows. The shoes are considered chic and fashion forward in appearance. Users appreciate the great quality and describe them as belle qualité. The sizing is generally accurate, with customers noting they are the right size. The fit works well for most users, and the shoes provide room to place shoe inserts. Customers also appreciate the heel height and find them lightweight. However, opinions on color vary among users.

authors_reviews.title: Great sneaker!!
authors_reviews.text: This is my second pair and l love both the look and feel. I am very petite at 5”2 so these sneakers give me an extra 3 inches. I purchased white so the heel blends into the shoe better. I would highly recommend this shoe if you’re looking for a sneaker that gives you more height. My husband liked the design of the sneaker too!
authors_reviews.author: Suzanne

authors_reviews.title: Beau modèle
authors_reviews.text: Très beaux et confortables. Grandeur juste
authors_reviews.author: Chantal Charbonneau

authors_reviews.title: Most comfortable and stylish👍👍👍
authors_reviews.text: I have never wanted to wear any runners/sneakers because I’m short. But with the higher heel, I wanted to try it and so happy I did! It didn’t have size 8 so I got the 8.5. It fit perfectly. Very well made, love the design and looks very trendy. Worn it for about three days and it’s still very very comfortable! Will order another pair. Thank you!👍👍👍👍
authors_reviews.author: Teresa Panayi

authors_reviews.title: Fit a bit small
authors_reviews.text: Nice shoe. Looks good, but do yourself a favour and buy one size bigger than you usually take.
authors_reviews.author: Luscious Granny

authors_reviews.title: Confortables et légères
authors_reviews.text: J'en ai acheté une paire l'année dernière.Elle est encore en très bon état. Je les ai tellement aimé que j'en ai racheté une deuxième pour stocker.Très élégantes, que ce soit avec un pantalon ou une jupe avec un aspect décontracté chic. Le talon compensé nous offre un confort de marche de longue durée et lles sont agréablement légères.Le 4 étoiles est parce que la deuxième paire que j'ai reçu est arrivéi avec des lignes de colle sur la partie inférieure des 2 côtés.
authors_reviews.author: meriem Dahel
